notes: Fixed CA Simulator timeline slider: scrolling back to Day 0 now correctly shows the seedling stage.
Scaled down Tomato plant rendering to fit within the simulator container.
Dashboard grid cards now use a taller 3:4 aspect ratio for better plant art visibility.
Aligned header and filter chip margins to match the grid layout.
Refreshed app icon from updated Figma export.
Fixed app scaling and responsiveness on tablets and varying screen sizes.
Restricted bottom sheet maximum widths to 500dp to ensure a clean layout.
Included layout refinements for the Dashboard and Add/Edit Plant sheets.
Updated CA Simulator visuals: scaled up Siling Labuyo and Tomato fruits for clarity.
PlantCard layout: health percentage now shown beside the health bar.
Fixed CA Engine initialization so mature plants start from their logged stage.
Removed unused Garden View toggle from Profile screen.
Introduced brand new custom Figma app icon.
Visual enhancements and scaling tweaks for CA Simulator graphics.
Refined Plant Card layout and updated Timeline Slider behavior.
Fixed dark theme override causing Log Today buttons to appear dark green.
Integrated localized Philippine agricultural plant care guidelines.
Enhanced dynamic plant health ring scaling and fixed alignment.
Enforced bright green primary color for UI elements.
